problem id: 080b44aa
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(5) AND NOT SHR(5)) XOR NOT SHL(3)

examples:
  10110001 -> 01000101
  11011000 -> 00100110
  00011101 -> 10110100
  11010010 -> 00110111
  10011001 -> 00000100
  01001000 -> 10110110
  10000111 -> 00110111
  11111010 -> 01110111
  11101110 -> 01010111

query: 11000111
predicted answer: 00111111
